TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_matatengil-20171002-Yincumin_cidekay_ulic_miasip_mikawaway-kalumyiti_atu_patizeng_kalunasulitan-sulu_a_matatengil, title = matatengil-20171002-Yincumin_cidekay_ulic_miasip_mikawaway-kalumyiti_atu_patizeng_kalunasulitan-sulu_a_matatengil, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/matatengil-20171002-Yincumin_cidekay_ulic_miasip_mikawaway-kalumyiti_atu_patizeng_kalunasulitan-sulu_a_matatengil} }

S.FORM: == 20171002-Yincumin cidekay ulic miasip mikawaway-kalumyiti atu patizeng kalunasulitan-sulu a matatengil == tatukian 2017 mihca 10 bulad 2 demiad (sakacacay a demiad nu lipay) puenengan Kanatal Zhengzhi tabakiaya a cacudadan nutelungay: Huang Ciping sasaydang, LIM Siu-theh sasaydang, Cai Huisia mikuwanay, Li Tayyuan sasaydang tayni mitengilay: Yincumin cideaky kamu saydang atu mikawaway-kalumyitiay laylay 14:00 papelu ku nutelungay a sasaydang 14:05 misiwkay ku tayniyay 14:15 sapuelac ku Yinmin tebanan- Cai Peicen saydang 14:20 pabalucu' kina kawaw 14:30 caykaw nu miasipay a kawaw mikawaway-kalumyitiay amana pasubana' tu mikilehay a micudaday amana pabinawlan ku ulic pabinawlan ku misangaay lalkuan 14:40 mahizaay nu miasipay a kawaw misiwkay ku mikawaway Cai Peicen atu Kuo Kongling mikawaway-kalumyitiay a sapuelac masitudung atu miasip u demiad nu pabalucu' u kalisiw nu pabalucu' u kalisiw nu kakilehay u kalisiw nu mikawaway-kalumyitiay u kalisiw nu masitudung atu miasip 14:50 masasakamu nu nasawniay a sapuelac 15:40 pasubana' tu Langsensici a calay-kakacawan(wangcan) 16:00 u zuma a kawaw 16:20 kasatezep natayniay 16 cidekay 42 kamu-kakuniza 126 tademaw muazih tu tatengaay belih nu Hulam a kumu 20171002-
S.PHON: == ********-jin ¶umin ¶id…ôkaj ur~…ĺi ¶ miasip mikawawaj-kar~…ĺumjiti atu patiz…ôŇč kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan-sur~…ĺu a matat…ôŇčir~…ĺ == tatukian **** mińß ¶a ** bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad (saka ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad nu r~…ĺipaj) pu…ôn…ôŇčan kanatar~…ĺ zńß…ôŇčzńßi tabakiaja a ¶a ¶udadan nut…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj: ńßuaŇč ¶ipiŇč sasajdaŇč, r~…ĺim siu-tńß…ôńß sasajdaŇč, ¶ai ńßuisia mikuwanaj, r~…ĺi tajjuan sasajdaŇč tajni mit…ôŇčir~…ĺaj: jin ¶umin ¶id…ôakj kamu sajdaŇč atu mikawawaj-kar~…ĺumjitiaj r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj **:** pap…ôr~…ĺu ku nut…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj a sasajdaŇč **:** misiwkaj ku tajnijaj **:** sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ku jinmin t…ôbanan- ¶ai p…ôi ¶…ôn sajdaŇč **:** pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° kina kawaw **:** ¶ajkaw nu miasipaj a kawaw mikawawaj-kar~…ĺumjitiaj amana pasubana Ē~ ° tu mikir~…ĺ…ôńßaj a mi ¶udadaj amana pabinawr~…ĺan ku ur~…ĺi ¶ pabinawr~…ĺan ku misaŇčaaj r~…ĺar~…ĺkuan **:** mańßizaaj nu miasipaj a kawaw misiwkaj ku mikawawaj ¶ai p…ôi ¶…ôn atu kuo koŇčr~…ĺiŇč mikawawaj-kar~…ĺumjitiaj a sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ masituduŇč atu miasip u d…ômiad nu pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° u kar~…ĺisiw nu pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° u kar~…ĺisiw nu kakir~…ĺ…ôńßaj u kar~…ĺisiw nu mikawawaj-kar~…ĺumjitiaj u kar~…ĺisiw nu masituduŇč atu miasip **:** masasakamu nu nasawniaj a sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ **:** pasubana Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺaŇčs…ônsi ¶i a ¶ar~…ĺaj-kaka ¶awan(waŇč ¶an) **:** u zuma a kawaw **:** kasat…ôz…ôp natajniaj ** ¶id…ôkaj ** kamu-kakuniza *** tad…ômaw muazińß tu tat…ôŇčaaj b…ôr~…ĺińß nu ńßur~…ĺam a kumu ********-
S.FORM: == 20171002-Yincumin cidekay ulic miasip mikawaway-kalumyiti atu patizeng kalunasulitan-sulu a matatengil == tatukian 2017 mihca 10 bulad 2 demiad (sakacacay a demiad nu lipay) puenengan Kanatal Zhengzhi tabakiaya a cacudadan nutelungay: Huang Ciping sasaydang, LIM Siu-theh sasaydang, Cai Huisia mikuwanay, Li Tayyuan sasaydang tayni mitengilay: Yincumin cideaky kamu saydang atu mikawaway-kalumyitiay laylay 14:00 papelu ku nutelungay a sasaydang 14:05 misiwkay ku tayniyay 14:15 sapuelac ku Yinmin tebanan- Cai Peicen saydang 14:20 pabalucu' kina kawaw 14:30 caykaw nu miasipay a kawaw mikawaway-kalumyitiay amana pasubana' tu mikilehay a micudaday amana pabinawlan ku ulic pabinawlan ku misangaay lalkuan 14:40 mahizaay nu miasipay a kawaw misiwkay ku mikawaway Cai Peicen atu Kuo Kongling mikawaway-kalumyitiay a sapuelac masitudung atu miasip u demiad nu pabalucu' u kalisiw nu pabalucu' u kalisiw nu kakilehay u kalisiw nu mikawaway-kalumyitiay u kalisiw nu masitudung atu miasip 14:50 masasakamu nu nasawniay a sapuelac 15:40 pasubana' tu Langsensici a calay-kakacawan(wangcan) 16:00 u zuma a kawaw 16:20 kasatezep natayniay 16 cidekay 42 kamu-kakuniza 126 tademaw muazih tu tatengaay belih nu Hulam a kumu 20171002-
S.PHON: == ********-jin ¶umin ¶id…ôkaj ur~…ĺi ¶ miasip mikawawaj-kar~…ĺumjiti atu patiz…ôŇč kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan-sur~…ĺu a matat…ôŇčir~…ĺ == tatukian **** mińß ¶a ** bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad (saka ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad nu r~…ĺipaj) pu…ôn…ôŇčan kanatar~…ĺ zńß…ôŇčzńßi tabakiaja a ¶a ¶udadan nut…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj: ńßuaŇč ¶ipiŇč sasajdaŇč, r~…ĺim siu-tńß…ôńß sasajdaŇč, ¶ai ńßuisia mikuwanaj, r~…ĺi tajjuan sasajdaŇč tajni mit…ôŇčir~…ĺaj: jin ¶umin ¶id…ôakj kamu sajdaŇč atu mikawawaj-kar~…ĺumjitiaj r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj **:** pap…ôr~…ĺu ku nut…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj a sasajdaŇč **:** misiwkaj ku tajnijaj **:** sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ku jinmin t…ôbanan- ¶ai p…ôi ¶…ôn sajdaŇč **:** pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° kina kawaw **:** ¶ajkaw nu miasipaj a kawaw mikawawaj-kar~…ĺumjitiaj amana pasubana Ē~ ° tu mikir~…ĺ…ôńßaj a mi ¶udadaj amana pabinawr~…ĺan ku ur~…ĺi ¶ pabinawr~…ĺan ku misaŇčaaj r~…ĺar~…ĺkuan **:** mańßizaaj nu miasipaj a kawaw misiwkaj ku mikawawaj ¶ai p…ôi ¶…ôn atu kuo koŇčr~…ĺiŇč mikawawaj-kar~…ĺumjitiaj a sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ masituduŇč atu miasip u d…ômiad nu pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° u kar~…ĺisiw nu pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° u kar~…ĺisiw nu kakir~…ĺ…ôńßaj u kar~…ĺisiw nu mikawawaj-kar~…ĺumjitiaj u kar~…ĺisiw nu masituduŇč atu miasip **:** masasakamu nu nasawniaj a sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ **:** pasubana Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺaŇčs…ônsi ¶i a ¶ar~…ĺaj-kaka ¶awan(waŇč ¶an) **:** u zuma a kawaw **:** kasat…ôz…ôp natajniaj ** ¶id…ôkaj ** kamu-kakuniza *** tad…ômaw muazińß tu tat…ôŇčaaj b…ôr~…ĺińß nu ńßur~…ĺam a kumu ********-
